news.t: Vident Announces Final Capital Gains Distributions
Vident Funds Announce Final Capital Gains Distributions

holdings.infoBox: VUSE is an equity ETF with a total of 126 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 2.92%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 2.89%, Western Digital at 2.72%, Broadcom at 2.72%, and Alphabet at 2.67%.

overview.description: The Vident U.S. Equity Strategy ETF (VUSE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Vident Core U.S. Stock index. The fund tracks an index of US companies selected and weighted based on a multi-factor model that considers corporate governance, quality, and momentum. VUSE was launched on Jan 22, 2014 and is issued by Vident.

data.title: Vident Announces Final Capital Gains Distributions
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vident Asset Management today announced that there are no expected capital gains distributions for the funds in its fund family.

data.title: Vident Funds Announce Final Capital Gains Distributions
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vident Funds announced that there will be no expected capital gains distributions for the funds in its fund family.
